description: Capitation tax (jizya) receipt for Salmūn [...], possibly a teacher (muʿallim) in Fustat. The payment total appears at upper right (1 dinar? 2 dinars?). Trigger: addā. The two ʿalāʾim are wa-l-ḥamdu lil-lāhi ʿalā iḥsānihī and wa-l-ḥamdu lil-lāhi al-muwaffiq li-ḥamdihī. The same two ʿalāʾim apper also in ENA 3945.9 (PGPID 10485) and ENA 3982.56 (PGPID 10922), and the latter appears in ENA 3936.1 (PGPID 10376).
description_he: מסמך ממלכתי בערבית. מוחזק באוסף מוסרי.
